requirements.title: Approved external runtime actions must be reconstructable and rollback-ready from canonical evidence before production execution claims are trusted.
requirements.acceptance_boundary: provider-execution-reproduction-audit and provider-rollback-proof-audit pass; unsupported rollback fails focused negative coverage.

forecast.estimated_token_cost_range: 0 additional implementation work items for v8.8 after final verification
forecast.forecast_boundary: Forecast is local runtime evidence and does not prove production safety or market value.

not_proven: Requirement coverage proves bounded traceability only.
